privileged_info_summary: The task requires predicting the next ISS pass from Pittsburgh, PA using GPredict. The environment is initialized with real CelesTrak TLE data (NORAD ID 25544 for ISS/ZARYA) and a ground station file for Pittsburgh (Latitude 40.4406 N, Longitude -79.9959 W, Altitude 230m). There are no specific metadata claims in task.json to verify.
